overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large backpack traversing a desolate, rocky mountain landscape with ancient stone ruins. The atmosphere is foggy and overcast with muted grey tones, featuring continuous forward movement through narrow passages and open plateaus alongside massive crumbling structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain slope approaching ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily uphill on rocky terrain toward distant stone ruins

entered.detail: large stone ruin structure with dark entrance visible ahead on the path
scattered large boulders and rock formations lining the left side of the path
hazy mountain peaks visible in the far background through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking across a desolate rocky slope scattered with boulders and sparse grass patches. Ahead lies the entrance to ancient stone ruins, partially obscured by fog, while distant mountains loom in the hazy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between ancient stone ruins

events.description: character enters narrow stone corridor between tall rock walls and ruins

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight rocky corridors between ancient stone structures

entered.detail: large multi-level ancient stone structure with tiered platforms emerging on the right
confined rocky corridor with walls on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a narrow stone passage flanked by high rock walls. A massive tiered ruin structure becomes visible on the right side as the path winds through the ancient ruins, with the initial entrance now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain plateau with massive ancient ruins

events.description: view opens up to reveal expansive valley and mountain range in the distance

agents.ego_description: traversing open rocky plateau alongside massive stone structures with valley views

entered.detail: tall crumbling stone tower structure visible on the left horizon
deep valley with misty atmosphere becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character walks across an open rocky plateau. The massive tiered ruin now dominates the right side at close range, while a ruined tower appears on the left and a vast misty valley opens up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path overlooking deep valley

events.description: path narrows along cliff edge with steep drop visible to the right

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along narrow cliff edge path with steep drop on right side

entered.detail: steep cliff edge with sharp drop-off immediately to the right of the path
distant valley floor visible far below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a narrow rocky path hugging the edge of a steep cliff. The massive ruins and tower fade from view as the path follows the cliff edge, with a dramatic drop to the valley floor visible on the right and distant mountains ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a desolate rocky slope into the heart of ancient ruins before emerging onto a precarious cliffside overlooking a vast valley. It begins with the character traversing a boulder-strewn incline under a hazy sky, moving steadily toward a fog-shrouded entrance of stone ruins. As the camera enters a narrow stone passage, the environment tightens between high rock walls, gradually revealing a massive tiered structure that looms over the winding path. The scene then opens onto a wide rocky plateau where the tiered ruin and a ruined tower flank the character, just before the terrain shifts again toward the edge of a steep precipice. Finally, the path hugs the cliffside, leaving the ruins behind as the view expands to show a dramatic drop to the valley floor and distant mountains ahead.
